features.name: ICP scoring rubric + keyword batch scorer
features.description: Define ICP_RUBRIC scoring constants: isFounder+30, isSaasOrTech+20, aiInterest+20, revenueSignal+15, builderSignal+10, linkedinActive+5, isContentMarketer-40, isCompetitor-50, isAgency-20, noHeadline-10. Score 0-100. Map to offer_readiness: >=70→25, >=50→15, >=30→10, >=15→5, <15→0. Process all 845 contacts from Supabase with keyword matching on headline+bio in <5s. Produce flags array and anti_icp bool.

features.name: Claude Haiku enrichment — top 50 contacts
features.description: For top 50 keyword-scored contacts: call Claude Haiku (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) with display_name, headline, bio, platform, pipeline_stage. Request JSON: {refined_score, icp_verdict (perfect_fit|strong_fit|weak_fit|anti_icp), key_reason, next_action, updated_summary}. Batch of 10 with 2s delay. Fallback to keyword score if Claude fails per contact.

features.name: Supabase bulk updater
features.description: Update ALL 845 contacts with new offer_readiness (keyword score). Update top 50 with: ai_summary, next_action, next_action_at=now()+24h, tags array (['icp_rescored_2026-03-07','fit:X','signal:Y']). Anti-ICP contacts (score<10): tag 'anti_icp', offer_readiness=0, next_action=NULL. Batch upserts of 50. Do NOT change pipeline_stage. Log: 'Updated 845 contacts. Top ICP: N, Anti-ICP: N'.

features.name: Report generator — JSON + Telegram + Obsidian
features.description: Write harness/icp-rescore-report.json: {runDate, totalContacted, scoreDistribution:{70+,50-70,30-50,15-30,'<15'}, top20:[{display_name,headline,platform,score,icp_verdict,next_action}], antiIcp:[{display_name,headline,reason}], platformBreakdown}. Send Telegram summary with top lead. Save Obsidian note to ~/.memory/vault/PROJECT-MEMORY/icp-rescore-YYYY-MM-DD.md.

features.name: CLI runner + integration test
features.description: node harness/icp-rescorer.js with flags: --dry-run (score+report, no Supabase writes), --top N (Claude enrichment count, default 50), --platform linkedin (filter one platform). Test: --dry-run produces score distribution and top20 list with correct fields. Print PASS/FAIL.
